# Melphalan Hydrochloride 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Melphalan Hydrochloride 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Melphalan Hydrochloride</strong> 目前有 <strong>21 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Melphalan Hydrochloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：High-dose of Phelinun used alone or in combination with other cytotoxic medicinal products and/or total body irradiation is indicated in the treatment of:  multiple myeloma, malignant lymphoma...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>malignant dysgerminomatous germ cell tumor of ovary（99.9%）</li>
<li>ovarian clear cell adenocarcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>primary non-gestational choriocarcinoma of ovary（99.8%）</li>
<li>maligant granulosa cell tumor of ovary（99.8%）</li>
<li>hereditary site-specific ovarian cancer syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>borderline epithelial tumor of ovary（99.8%）</li>
<li>gonadal germ cell tumor（99.8%）</li>
<li>ovarian primitive germ cell tumor（99.8%）</li>
<li>choriocarcinoma of ovary（99.7%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>ovarian mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.6%）</li>
<li>malignant sex cord stromal tumor of ovary（99.6%）</li>
<li>malignant non-epithelial tumor of ovary（99.5%）</li>
<li>malignant germ cell tumor of ovary（99.5%）</li>
<li>familial ovarian cancer（99.4%）</li>
<li>ovarian endometrioid adenocarcinoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>ovarian small cell carcinoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>rectum mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>theca steroid-producing cell malignant tumor of ovary, not further specified（99.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/melphalan-hydrochloride/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
